title: The Pack Returns
description: Howls surround the road, carrying the memory of your earlier encounter.

saved_wolf.title: A Debt Repaid
saved_wolf.description: The wolf you saved emerges from the trees at the head of its pack. It lowers its head, then turns toward danger hidden farther down the road.

ignored_wolf.title: The Wound Remembered
ignored_wolf.description: A scarred wolf blocks the path. It survived without your help, and the pack behind it watches to see what you will do now.

killed_wolf.title: The Pack's Judgment
killed_wolf.description: The pack has found the place where one of its own died. Their accusing eyes settle upon you as the circle tightens.

options.title: Offer Peace
options.description: Lower your hands and trust that mercy can still be understood.

options.title: Seize the Advantage
options.description: Use the confusion to claim what the wilderness has hidden nearby.

options.title: Keep Your Distance
options.description: Leave the pack and its memories behind.
